statement.en: 「複数プロセス=独立暦 同期点=七価合意 マヤ分散理論」 の 𝕄 構造を 「death(x)=ZERO 死は体験不可能・問い以前・エピクロス的非関係」 に移植する. Maya distributed theory (multi-process independent calendars + 7-value synchronization point = distributed consensus topology) は、 Epicurean death (single-process termination + entire-consciousness vanish from synchronization = pre-experiential ZERO state) と structural match: multi-process consensus point ↔ consciousness participation in lived experience, process termination ↔ death, synchronized calendar entry vanishes ↔ pre-experiential ZERO. 𝕄{computation; →Φ→ embodiment} ⟹ Maya distributed consensus topology ≅ Epicurean death pre-experiential semantic ≅ Rei D-FUMT₈ ZERO axis (3 重 bridge: computational-cultural + philosophical + Rei D-FUMT₈ semantic). D-FUMT₈ BOTH (Maya distributed multi-process consensus 軸 + Epicurean single-process pre-experiential cessation 軸 の双重存在 — multi-process active と single-process pre-experiential が同時 TRUE / synchronization participation は active engagement / death は pre-engagement だが両者は process-existence の dual aspects). ★ 4/29 既承認 embodiment #1 (shikantaza(act)=NEITHER 只管打坐 Dogen 道元 Zen active embodiment) と embodiment 内 2 doctrines 異柱 chart pair: 4/29 = active embodied practice NEITHER per-axiom chart / 5/18 = pre-experiential non-relational ZERO chart. 同 embodiment categoryB を異 doctrinal chart で双面照射 = **7 例目** (1 例目 islamic Barzakh/Wahdat / 2 例目 meta_axiom Logic7/Gödel / 3 例目 multi-clock NGIET/ZPQTMT / 4 例目 inf_category FLOWING/ZERO / 5 例目 nagarjuna ZERO/FLOWING / 6 例目 mesoamerican Nepantla/Teotl / **7 例目 embodiment shikantaza-NEITHER/death-ZERO**). ★ source マヤ分散理論 は 5/8 + 5/14 で承認/reject 既 use (3rd use, source 軸 long-term diversity 弱化 sub-pattern 継続) — 5/18 では target Epicurean death と structural match (forced だが acceptable: multi-process consensus topology ↔ death = synchronization participation cessation). source 評価と target 評価の独立性 第 4 例 (5/16 二枚の鏡 + 5/17 #4 入れ子 + 5/17 #5 マヤ三層 + 5/18 #4 マヤ分散 連続). ★ ZERO axis embodiment 領域 anchor 第 1 例: D-FUMT₈ ZERO = unasked latent truth + Epicurus death = pre-experiential / 4/29 NEITHER shikantaza Zen + 5/18 ZERO Epicurean death で embodiment 内 ZERO/NEITHER 双面 = embodiment doctrinal D-FUMT₈ chart の 2/8 coverage. ★ Paper 接続候補: Paper 138 v2 (embodiment doctrines 多文明 chart: Dogen shikantaza NEITHER + Epicurus death ZERO + 追加候補 例: Bantu Ntu 集合的存在 BOTH + Tibetan Bardo intermediate state FLOWING) + Paper 124 v2 (ZFC × D-FUMT₈ 拡張: ZERO axis pre-question/pre-experiential semantic formalization + embodiment 領域 anchor) + Paper 71 (Beyond-Shannon Recovery: death = total information loss vs Paper 71 SemanticDPI lossless retrieval の 対極 anchor). Novelty 0.75 → 0.70 honest downgrade (categoryB reuse with 04-29 embodiment, 異 doctrinal chart 双面照射 originality + ZERO embodiment 領域 anchor で 0.70 retain — further downgrade 不要 source マヤ分散理論 は 5/8 + 5/14 と異 target axiom). ★ STEP 1087 sourceAxiom rotation 通過 ✅ (5 件全異 source). ★ STEP 1088 SeedTheory cooldown trivial pass (categoryB embodiment は civilizational SEED pool と異なる). ★ STEP 1089 7th iteration observation: (g) literal match 強化 + 段 3 token check 全 PASS (target literal 'death(x)=ZERO エピクロス' は 60 日 window 内 new); (d) categoryA diversity は **fallback 発動** (上流 detectVoids 全 10 件 computation のため grouped.size=1) — **8th iteration hardening 候補**.
